seo_description: Current time in Monterrey, Mexico. Central Time — CST (UTC-6) in winter, CDT (UTC-5) during DST. Live clock and time differences for Monterrey.

faq.question: What time is it in Monterrey right now?
faq.answer: Monterrey, Nuevo León, Mexico uses Central Standard Time (CST, UTC-6) in winter and Central Daylight Time (CDT, UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Monterrey. Monterrey is on the same time as Mexico City, Chicago, Dallas, and Houston. The live clock above shows the current Monterrey time.

faq.question: What time zone is Monterrey in?
faq.answer: Monterrey, Mexico is in the Central Time Zone. It uses CST (UTC-6) in winter and CDT (UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/Monterrey. Mexico's DST schedule is similar but not identical to the US schedule — Mexican DST begins the first Sunday in April and ends the last Sunday in October.

faq.question: Does Monterrey observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Monterrey, Mexico observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the first Sunday of April (CST → CDT) and fall back on the last Sunday in October. Mexico's DST dates differ slightly from the US schedule, so there are brief periods in March when Monterrey and US Central Time are offset. Note: In 2022, Mexico eliminated DST for most of the country; however, Nuevo León and other northern border states retained DST to align with US time zones for business reasons.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Monterrey and New York?
faq.answer: Monterrey (CST/CDT, Central Time) is typically 1 hour behind New York (EST/EDT, Eastern Time). Both observe DST on approximately the same schedule, though there are brief 1–2 week windows in spring and fall when the difference temporarily changes to 0 or 2 hours due to different DST transition dates.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Monterrey and Houston?
faq.answer: Monterrey (CST/CDT, Central Time) and Houston (CST/CDT, Central Time) share the same time zone. IANA identifiers differ (America/Monterrey vs America/Chicago) but both cities use Central Time with DST. When it is 10:00 AM in Houston, it is also 10:00 AM in Monterrey — except during the brief DST transition windows in spring and fall.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Monterrey?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Monterrey are 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CST/CDT, Monday through Friday. Monterrey is Mexico's third-largest city and its industrial and business capital. The city is home to major multinationals and Mexican corporations including CEMEX, FEMSA (Coca-Cola FEMSA), Banorte, Alfa, Vitro, and Ternium. Monterrey's proximity to the US border (240 km from Laredo, TX) makes it a leading nearshore manufacturing and business services hub.
